title: CobbleMario: Mario Enemies as Cobblemon!
description: An add-on which aims to add the most common Mario enemies  as pokemon in Cobblemon! Currently only Goombas are added so far. Coming up soon: Koopas and Bob-ombs!
body:
An addo-on which aims to add the most common Mario enemies as Cobblemon! Made entirely by myself. Includes custom-made abilities and moves!
I've been working on this thing for over 2 years now, finally starting to release it. Starting with the now finall finished Goombas.
